# Curator Receipt

## Decision

This source is kept because it is a formal research paper with real benchmark construction details and reported model performance.

## Why

The excerpt describes a published ICLR 2024 paper introducing SWE-bench, a structured benchmark built from 2,294 real GitHub issue-resolution tasks across 12 repositories, with execution-based verification and explicit quantitative results such as Claude 2 solving 1.96% of issues. That is clear empirical substance and fits institute scope.

## Limits

# Curator Receipt

## Decision

This source is kept because it is a formal research paper with real benchmark construction details and reported model performance.

## Why

The excerpt describes a published ICLR 2024 paper introducing SWE-bench, a structured benchmark built from 2,294 real GitHub issue-resolution tasks across 12 repositories, with execution-based verification and explicit quantitative results such as Claude 2 solving 1.96% of issues. That is clear empirical substance and fits institute scope.

## Limits

This is a benchmark paper, not a production field report; downstream work should preserve that its evidence comes from a constructed evaluation setting rather than live deployment outcomes.
